title: carex divisa var. austriaca
intro: Carex divisa var. austriaca, also known as the Austrian sedge, is a variety of the Carex divisa plant, a type of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carex divisa var. austriaca include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies for various health issues.
